message:
feat(migration): implement M3 checkpoint synchronization with monotonicity checks

Adds m3_checkpoint_sync() to MigrationEngine: discovers consumers via
lag_metrics(), reads their checkpoints, verifies ordinals fall within
manifest range, resets stale consumers to safe replay point, and
commits to target. Includes CheckpointSyncResult, new error variants,
and 11 new tests (41 total).

Closes ft-2vuw7.1.4.1.3.1.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
